_comment: Spec 054 reserved callsign terms (FR-004). Seeded at deploy via deploy-callsign-registry.js, which hashes each canonical term with keccak256(bytes(term)) and batches setReserved(hashes,true). Terms MUST already be in canonical form (3-20 chars, lowercase a-z/0-9, single interior hyphens) or they can never collide with a registrable tag and are pointless to reserve. Curate additively via setReserved on-chain (REGISTRY_CURATOR_ROLE); this file is the initial list only.
